arts.ttl: Ipswich Town: Don Goodman on Aston Villa draw and Mick McCarthy
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: However, Town certainly impressed outsiders with their strong showing against Unai Emery’s men on Sunday, and Goodman believes that it’ll give them confidence going into the next few weeks. Goodman was also asked about Mick McCarthy, who’s reportedly been lined up for the next series of ‘I’m A Celebrity… Get Me Out of Here!’ by ITV producers.
